recommendations.title: Dream Boy
recommendations.overview: The story of Nathan, a young teenager who tries to flourish in a romantic relationship with neighbour Roy. The two young men will have to face the brutal reality of the rural south of the United States in the late 1970s.

recommendations.title: Dawn Breaks, Which Is No Small Thing
recommendations.overview: Teodoro, a Spanish engineer working as a professor in the United States, returns to Spain to enjoy a sabbatical year.

recommendations.title: American Animals
recommendations.overview: Lexington, Kentucky, 2004. Four young men attempt to execute one of the most audacious art heists in the history of the United States.

recommendations.title: Henry & June
recommendations.overview: While traveling in Paris, author Henry Miller and his wife, June, meet Anais Nin, and sexual sparks fly as Nin starts an affair with the openly bisexual June. When June is forced to return to the U.S., she gives Nin her blessing to sleep with her hus

recommendations.title: Paranormal Activity: Tokyo Night
recommendations.overview: Koichi takes care of his sister, who has recently returned from a trip abroad in the United States as she is not well. While caring for her, he records evidence of ghosts in their home.

recommendations.title: Borat Subsequent Moviefilm: Delivery of Prodigious Bribe to American Regime for Make Benefit Once Glorious Nation of Kazakhstan
recommendations.overview: 14 years after making a film about his journey across the USA, Borat risks life and limb when he returns to the United States with his young daughter, and reveals more about the culture, the COVID-19 pandemic, and the political elections.

recommendations.title: 13th
recommendations.overview: An in-depth look at the prison system in the United States and how it reveals the nation's history of racial inequality.

recommendations.title: The Haunting in Connecticut 2: Ghosts of Georgia
recommendations.overview: A young family moves into a historic home in Georgia, only to learn they are not the house's only inhabitants. Soon they find themselves in the presence of a secret rising from underground and threatening to bring down anyone in its path.

recommendations.title: Detroit
recommendations.overview: A police raid in Detroit in 1967 results in one of the largest citizens' uprisings in the history of the United States.

recommendations.title: The Oath
recommendations.overview: In a politically-divided United States, a man struggles to make it through the Thanksgiving holiday without destroying his family.
